meaning: adj.植物的,植物性的,生长的,动植物共通的
examples: There are three kinds of life: the vegetal life, zooid life, and the rational life.
Having or showing vigorous vegetal or animal life.
Ingredients: vegetal botulinum, rice germ oil, HA, vitamin c, collagen.
Some 50 million years ago, the climate in the southwest region of Wyoming was a vegetal and aquatic paradise.
Mr. Montes is similarly cautious: "Its flavor can be overly spicy and vegetal, " he told me a few years ago.
